description: Experimentally determine the default 'Low SpO2' alarm threshold for the Simulated Pulse Oximeter. Identify the threshold value and the resulting alarm message by observing the Alarm List clinical application while interacting with a Simulated Pulse Oximeter device adapter. Save a screenshot of the triggered alarm to /home/ga/Desktop/alarm_trigger_evidence.png. Document the findings in a JSON report at /home/ga/Desktop/alarm_threshold_report.json with the following format: {"device": "Pulse Oximeter", "threshold_value": <integer_value_found>, "alarm_message": "<message_displayed>"}.
